0.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the apical and anterior segments of the right upper lobe

1.text: Increased centriacinar nodular density in the superior and posterobasal segments of the right lower lobe

2.text: Increased centriacinar nodular density in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Focal areas of atelectasis in the inferior subsegment of the lingular segment of the left upper lobe
